title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Aravind Eye Hospital

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Aravind Eye Hospital
jsonLd.description:
Aravind Eye Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aravind Eye Hospital:
Aravind Eye Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aravind Eye Hospital!
